skills.name: Pulse Impact
skills.description: Fires high-output energy from the Pulse Revolver to attack the enemy. Grants self CRIT Rate Up for 2 turns and inflicts the enemy with Bleed for 2 turns with a 75% chance. Inflicts the enemy with an additional instance of Bleed for 2 turns with a 100% chance if Leap is at max stacks after attacking.

levels.description: Fires high-output energy from the Pulse Revolver to attack the enemy. Grants self CRIT Rate Up for 2 turns and inflicts the enemy with Bleed for 2 turns with a 75% chance. Inflicts the enemy with an additional instance of Bleed for 2 turns with a 100% chance if Leap is at max stacks after attacking.

seEffects.buffDesc: Increases CRIT Rate by 30%.
